visualGoal: Make a buyer internalize that you build a simulator around the launch monitor, then guide them to the right complete build by budget. Real launch-monitor, enclosure, projector, mat, screen, and netting product proof throughout; no procedural art.

realProductPhotosNeeded.notes: Image file is embedded in the body and hero, but skytrak-st-max.jpg is NOT in verified-product-images.json. Vision-verify it is the actual ST MAX (not the discontinued SkyTrak+) and add it to the verified list; it anchors the whole guide.
Embedded in the screen/enclosure shotgrid but NOT in verified-product-images.json. Vision-verify and add to the verified list.
Text-only in the overhead-flagships aside because no verified image. Vision-verify before promoting to a body visual.
Text-only in the overhead aside. Needs verified photo before it can appear as a body image.

editorialCompositePrompts.prompt: Realistic finished home golf simulator bay at dusk, glowing fairway on a full-width impact screen, warm gold accent lighting on forest-green walls, a hitting mat with an open product-overlay space beside the tee for a real launch monitor, curator Nina Brooks to the side reviewing a build checklist on a tablet, no fake branded hardware, no fake UI, 16:9 editorial cover.
editorialCompositePrompts.negativePrompt: fake logos, fake launch monitor, warped screen, impossible geometry, tiny unreadable text, procedural gradient art

infographicPrompts.title: The three builds that actually work in 2026
content: Launch monitor chosen first, room built to fit it
infographicPrompts.style: IgnitionSim command-center chart, large readable text, golf greens/golds, real product photos as row markers for Codex overlay

infographicPrompts.title: The 2.5x rule: what a build actually costs
content: Launch monitor price x 2.5-3x = complete-room budget
One premium flex per budget, rest stays boring and correct
Price recurring GSPro + subscription costs, not just sticker

curatorScenePrompts.prompt: Realistic adult golf curator Nina Brooks in a clean finished home simulator bay, one hand gesturing at a hitting mat and screen, confident estimator energy, product overlay space beside her, practical not fantasy, 4:5 portrait.
